Petition For Court Supervision Of Conservatee'S Trust
Off Calendar Oct-23-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lillian Ng for and with Teri-Lee Baack (Temporary Successor Trustee). Richard Tessman (Trustor) in propria persona. John Baack (Interested Party/Beneficiary)

The Court stated that all parties had been served except John Baack and Teri-Lee Baack, and noted both parties were present in court. The Court excused notice as to Teri-Lee Baack and John Baack upon a waiver by both parties in open court. The Court granted Ms. Ng's request to reduce the bond amount to $100,000.00 and reduce the amount to be placed in the blocked account to $850,000.00. The Court granted the Petition for Court Supervision of Conservatee's Trust, To Confirm Vacany in the Office of Trustee, and for the Appointment of a Successor Trustee (signing an order for the same in open court).

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Court Reporter: Peppina Thompson, CSR#7433. Court Investigator: Melinda Gean. Clerk: Jackie Alameda/ S. Ravinantapricha. Bailiff: Deputy R. Cabrera.
